**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiaxing Dehe Automotive Parts Co., Ltd. presents a typical profile of a micro-scale machining workshop that has migrated from a tier-1 city to a lower-cost manufacturing hub. Originally established in Shanghai as 'Shanghai Fenghe Metal Products', its USCC still retains the Shanghai '9131' prefix. It later relocated to Haiyan County, Jiaxing (Zhejiang Province), a common move for cost-sensitive, environmentally regulated metalworking shops. Operating as a sole proprietorship with a small paid-in capital of 500,000 RMB and 17 insured employees, its physical footprint—'East side of the 1st floor, Workshop 1'—confirms its status as a foundational Tier-3/Tier-4 subcontractor. It specializes in low-value-added processes like metal stamping, cold sheet metal processing, and basic plastic injection for auto parts and general hardware.
